items.headline: Ronaldo makes history as Portugal hammer Uzbekistan 5-0
items.body: CR7 bagged a brace to become the first player ever to score at six different World Cups — and at 41 he's nowhere near done. Nuno Mendes and Rafael Leão piled on as Portugal cruised to the top of Group K.
items.say: Ronaldo just became the first player to score at six different World Cups — and he's 41. The guy refuses to age.

items.headline: Final group matchday — Brazil vs. Scotland headlines today
items.body: Groups A, B and C close out today with everything still up for grabs. The big one: Brazil host Scotland in Miami (6pm ET, FOX), with Scotland needing a result to keep their knockout dream alive against a Brazil side they've never beaten.
items.say: It's the last round of group games today — Brazil-Scotland's the one to watch. Scotland actually have a shot at the knockouts if they can pull it off.

links.text: Al Jazeera: Brazil vs. Scotland preview

items.headline: Wizards take AJ Dybantsa No. 1 overall
items.body: Washington kicked off the 2026 NBA Draft by grabbing BYU's 19-year-old phenom AJ Dybantsa — the first No. 1 pick in school history. Darryn Peterson went No. 2 to Utah and Cameron Boozer No. 3 to Memphis in a loaded class.
items.say: The Wizards took AJ Dybantsa first overall last night — 19 years old, out of BYU. Washington might finally have its guy.

items.headline: Falcons sweep FURIA to win the Cologne Major — NiKo finally gets one
items.body: Team Falcons routed FURIA 3-0 at a sold-out Lanxess Arena to claim the IEM Cologne Major, with star AWPer m0NESY named MVP. The headline, though: veteran NiKo lifted his first-ever Major trophy after eight years of near-misses.
items.say: Falcons swept the Cologne Major 3-0, and NiKo finally won his first Major after years of coming up short. Even neutrals were happy for him.

links.text: ESL: Falcons vs. FURIA grand final highlights

items.headline: Knicks end a 53-year wait for a title
items.body: Still buzzing around the league: New York's first championship since 1973, sealed by Jalen Brunson's 45-point Game 5 to close out Wembanyama's Spurs. Brunson took home Finals MVP and the city absolutely lost it.
items.say: Can you believe the Knicks finally won it all — first time since 1973? Brunson dropped 45 in the clincher. New York went nuts.

links.text: CBS: Knicks win first title in 53 years

items.headline: 'Toy Story 5' is the biggest box-office opener of 2026
items.body: Woody and Buzz are back — and minting money. The Pixar sequel scored a record opening, the biggest debut of the year so far, as the gang squares off with a sassy new tablet named Lilypad. Tom Hanks and Tim Allen lead the voice cast.
items.say: Toy Story 5's already the biggest opening of the year. Have you taken the kids yet, or is that this weekend's plan?

items.headline: 'The Bear' serves up its final season Thursday
items.body: One last service. The fifth and final season of FX's kitchen-pressure cooker drops all eight episodes Thursday on Hulu, with the crew chasing a Michelin star as the restaurant's future hangs in the balance. Yes, chef.
items.say: The Bear's final season hits Thursday — all eight episodes at once. I'm not ready for it to end, honestly.

items.headline: Live-action 'Avatar' returns for Season 2 Thursday
items.body: Netflix drops all seven episodes of Season 2 on Thursday, taking Aang and the gang into the Earth Kingdom — and finally introducing fan-favorite earthbender Toph. Expect Ba Sing Se, Azula, and a whole lot of bending.
items.say: Live-action Avatar Season 2 drops Thursday too — they're finally bringing in Toph. Fans have been waiting forever for that.

items.headline: Muse return with 'The Wow! Signal' on Friday
items.body: The arena-rock trio's tenth album lands Friday, a cosmic concept record about reaching out to something bigger than us. Lead single 'Be With You' opens on a church organ before erupting into classic Muse bombast — and yes, they literally beamed the video into space.
items.say: New Muse album's out Friday — lead single 'Be With You' is peak over-the-top Muse. They actually sent the music video to space to premiere it.
